/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libperception_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libperception_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/perception_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/perception_msgs/msg/detail/detection__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/perception_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/perception_msgs/msg/detail/detection_array__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/perception_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libperception_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
